title: Pix BackPack
description: Pix BackPack is a Minecraft plugin that adds a craftable backpack with four pages of storage. Each page has 56 slots, giving a total of 224 slots. Items stored inside do not drop on death.
body:
🎒 Pix BackPack Plugin for Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.8 (Spigot/Paper)

✨ Features:

4-page Backpack GUI 🧳 with 56 slots per page → total 224 slots

🛡️ Items in the backpack do not drop on death

Craftable using Leather + Wood + Stick 🔨

Data persists between server restarts 💾

Easy-to-use GUI navigation for switching pages ⏩

Perfect for Survival, Adventure, and Roleplay servers. 🌍

Made By Pixel Beast.
